characters.name: Hannah Webster
characters.description: "Hannah Webster"Biographical informationDied1999;Buckland Auction HouseAliasHannah WebsterMaritalIn a possible romantic relationship with "Rex Buckland"Physical descriptionSpeciesWarlockGenderFemaleHeight5' 1" (1.55 m)Hair colorRedEyes colorBlueSkin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersThermokinesisShapeshiftingInactivepowersHigh ResistanceImmortalityPower AbsorptionBasicpowersSpell CastingPotion BrewingScryingAffiliationOccupation"Rex Buckland"'s assistantStealing Witches' powersLoyaltyEvilThe Source of All EvilRex BucklandCharacter informationFirstappearanceI've Got You Under My SkinLastappearanceWicca EnvyPortrayed byLeigh-Allyn Baker "Hannah Webster"was the identity used by awarlockwhose mission was to destroythe Charmed Ones. The realHannah Websterwas amortal, who served as an assistant to successfulBuckland Auction HouseownerRex Buckland. The real Rex and Hannah were murdered by twowarlockswho assumed their identities to establish a foothold in the mortal world to the benefit ofThe Underworld. The warlock "Hannah Webster" was able to ignite fires with her breath, as well asshapeshift. Rex and Hannah had been dispatched bythe Sourceto acquire the powers ofthe Charmed Ones. Hannah, along with Rex, began to watch the oldest of the Charmed Ones,Prue, once Prue has been hired at the auction house. Hannah and Rex were in a relationship and she became extremely jealous when other women spoke to him. Because of this, she spent most of her time finding petty ways to annoy Prue, such as tricking her into doing useless work at the auction house and stealing her sandwich.

characters.name: Rex Buckland
characters.description: "Rex Buckland"Biographical informationDied1999;Buckland Auction HouseAliasRex BucklandMaritalIn a possible romantic relationship with "Hannah Webster"Physical descriptionSpeciesWarlockGenderMaleHeight5' 10" (178 cm)Hair colorBrownEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersAstral ProjectionSuggestionIllusion CastingInactivepowersPower AbsorptionImmortalityBasicpowersSpell CastingPotion BrewingScryingAffiliationOccupationOwner ofBuckland Auction HouseDestroyingthe Charmed OnesLoyaltyThe Source of All EvilCharacter informationFirstappearanceI've Got You Under My SkinLastappearanceWicca EnvyPortrayed byNeil Roberts "Rex Buckland" was the identity used by awarlockwhose mission was to destroythe Charmed Ones. The realRex Bucklandwas amortal, owner of a successfulauction house, which bore his surname. The warlock was sent bythe Source of All Evilto confirm the existence of theCharmed Ones. To do this, Rex hiredPrue Halliwellat Buckland. Along with his partner "Hannah Webster", he tried to destroy the Charmed Ones several times. Rex and Hannah made their final move by framing Prue for theft and later murder. The warlocks forced the sisters to surrender their powers, though their plan was foiled byLeo Wyatt, who returned the sisters' powers, allowing them to vanquish the warlocks.

characters.name: 2009 Anchor
characters.description: 2009 AnchorPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHeight6' (1.83 m)Hair colorBlackEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationNews AnchorCharacter informationOnlyappearanceMorality BitesPortrayed byRichard Saxton The2009 Anchorwas a TV news anchor in the alternate future year of2009. The news anchor announched an update onPhoebe's execution whenthe Charmed Onestravelled to the futurefrom1999to2009. This news report was witnessed byPiper, who had just woken up in her future self's body. The full announcement was coming up after the regular programming, 'MTV's Real World 18, on the Moon'.

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: AaronPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHair colorWhiteSkin colorWhiteCharacter informationOnlyappearanceCharmed Again, Part 1 Aaronis one of the mourners atPrue's funeral and wake. Aaron sat behindColeduring the funeral, and was later having a conversation withVictorwhenPhoebeinterrupted and excused him to tell her father she and Cole were leaving.

characters.name: Abbey
characters.description: AbbeyBiographical informationMaritalSinglePhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderFemaleHair colorAuburnEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationAssistant Manager atP3(formerly)Character informationFirstappearanceOnce Upon a TimeLastappearanceSight UnseenPortrayed byBoti Ann Bliss Abbeyis a mortal woman, and the former assistant manager atP3. She developed a fixation withPruebecause of her beauty, successful career and the fact that she was loved by men. Eventually, her obsession grew to the point where she wanted to become Prue. Sometime after she was hired atP3, Abbey developed an obsession withPruefor her beauty, luck with men, and successful career, since she lacked it all. She began stalking Prue and taking several pictures of her with a camera similar to the ones Prue used. She even went as far as slipping into the manor, smashing all the mirrors, and stealingGrams' necklace and one of Prue's shirts. When Prue walked in on her, Abbey jumped on her back, but Pruetelekineticallyflung her out the window, allowing Abbey to escape and return later.

characters.name: Abet
characters.description: AbetBiographical informationDiedOctober 30th,2005;San Franciscoback alleyPhysical descriptionSpeciesDemonGenderMaleHair colorBlackEyes colorBrownSkin colorDarkMagical characteristicsActivepowersShapeshiftingCharacter informationOnlyappearanceKill Billie: Vol. 1Portrayed byJimi Antoine Abetwas ademonicshapeshifterwho was vanquished bythe Doganfor hispowers. While Abet was disguised as a young woman, the Dogan was able to see through his disguise and cornered him in a dark alley. As his powers were taken and he wasvanquished, he was seemingly fullyabsorbedby the Dogan.

characters.name: Abraxas
characters.description: TVComicsAbraxasBiographical informationDied1999; local park inSan FranciscoPhysical descriptionSpeciesDemonGenderMaleEyes colorYellowSkin colorBrownish redMagical characteristicsActivepowersTelekinesisForce BlastLevitationProjective LevitationPortal CreationRemote FadingInactivepowersImmortalityBasicpowersSpell CastingMagical itemsBook of Shadows(temporarily)AffiliationOccupationDemonizing the source of a good witch's powerResidenceTheAstral PlaneLoyaltyEvilCharacter informationFirstappearanceWitch TrialLastappearanceFear Always Comes BackPortrayed byWalter Phelan Abraxaswas ademonthat resided in theAstral Plane. He was known for stripping the powers of goodwitchesby demonizing the source of their power. He succeeded in stealing theBook of Shadowsfrom the Halliwell Manor and used it to reverse the vanquishing spells theCharmed Oneshad cast, causing their old enemies to be resurrected. Abraxas managed to steal theBook of Shadowsfrom the manor bypullingit into theAstral Plane. He then started reading its pages backwards, reversing the spells the Charmed Ones had cast and resurrecting their old foes. His goal was to reverse all spells in the book, ending with the "Dominus Trinus" spell that had granted the sisters their powers. Abraxas managed to resurrect theWoogyman,Jeremy Burns, andNicholasbefore the sisters used the energy of the equinox to recall the Book of Shadows by reciting the Dominus Trinus. Abraxas was then summoned from the Astral Plane and vanquished.

characters.name: Action Figures
characters.description: Action FiguresBiographical informationBorn2006Physical descriptionSpeciesArtificial BeingsGenderMaleMagical characteristicsDesiresTo findLeo WyattAffiliationLoyaltyWyatt HalliwellCharacter informationOnlyappearancePayback's a WitchPortrayed byLee Reherman(Soldier)Gil Birmingham(Indian Chief)Paul Townsend(Sheriff)TheAction Figureswere three action figures brought to life byWyatt Halliwell. They represented his pain and confusion about the disappearance ofhis father. Wyatt's toys Before his third birthday,Piper Halliwellnoticed her son was upset about the disappearance of his father and that he was acting out. She suspected there was more going on and later allowedPhoebeto try to talk to him. Phoebe used aspellto allowWuveyto speak and share his emotions. Wyatt then turned to his action figure andbrought them to life.

characters.name: Ad Exec
characters.description: Ad ExecPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownAffiliationOccupationAdvertisement executive atThe Bay MirrorCharacter informationOnlyappearanceScry HardPortrayed byDavid GorylThead execworks atThe Bay Mirror. WhileElise Rothmanis out on a date,Phoebe Halliwellis unexpectedly put in charge of managing the paper for the evening edition. The ad exec worries when he realizes they oversold an ad space. A few hours later, Phoebe looks at the ads and tells him to print them in a shrunken size. He argues the ads were promised a certain size, so she suggests making the font bigger, and if there are complaints, they will offer them a bottle of Cristal on Elise's tab.

characters.name: Ad Exec
characters.description: Ad ExecPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHair colorBrownAffiliationOccupationAdvertisement executive atThe Bay MirrorCharacter informationOnlyappearanceScry HardPortrayed byDavid GorylThead execworks atThe Bay Mirror. WhileElise Rothmanis out on a date,Phoebe Halliwellis unexpectedly put in charge of managing the paper for the evening edition. The ad exec worries when he realizes they oversold an ad space. A few hours later, Phoebe looks at the ads and tells him to print them in a shrunken size. He argues the ads were promised a certain size, so she suggests making the font bigger, and if there are complaints, they will offer them a bottle of Cristal on Elise's tab.

characters.name: Adair
characters.description: AdairBiographical informationDied2010,Cupid's TempleTitle(s)ElderPhysical descriptionSpeciesWhitelighterGenderMaleHeight6′ 8½″ (2.04 m)Hair colorGrayishMagical characteristicsActivepowersReality WarpingElder PowersAffiliationOccupationMember ofthe TribunalLoyaltySecret of magicCharacter informationFirstappearanceCrimes and Witch-DemeanorsLastappearanceTribunal and TribulationsPortrayed byKen PageAdairwas a member ofthe Tribunaland anElder. Adair and the rest of the Tribunal were present whenthe Charmed OnesandGideonwent on trial in their attempt to saveDarryl Morrisfrom being innocently executed.Barbastalked against them and pointed out all the times they failed to protect the secrecy ofmagic, which nearly came to conclude with the stripping of all the sisters'powers. However,LeoandChriswere able to prove Barbas' insincerity by forcing out aPhantasmthat was working with him. The Tribunal then used their collective powers to change Darryl's fate, while also strippingPhoebe's individual powers as punishment for misusing her magic. Her powers could be earned back by proving herself responsible and devoted to protecting the world once more. In2010, the Court of Love deemed Phoebe's husbandCoop Halliwellhaving grown irresponsible of his actions and decreed that he be separated from his family. Wanting to overthrow the decree, the Charmed Ones went toCupid's Templeto confront theCupid Judge, only to walk into a Tribunal meeting. They discussed matters ofthe Old Onesand urged the sisters to handle the situation, in exchange for allowing Coop to return to them. After finding outPrue Halliwellhad become one withHeremus, an Old One, the Tribunal sent agents to kidnapBen,Kyra, andTylerto find ways to stop the Old Ones from rising. Unfortunately, duringMother's examination, Prue found a weak point in her confinement and escaped, arriving directly in front of the Tribunal. Though they all attacked at once, she easily slaughtered them, decimating the Tribunal.

After finding outPrue Halliwellhad become one withHeremus, an Old One, the Tribunal sent agents to kidnapBen,Kyra, andTylerto find ways to stop the Old Ones from rising. characters.name: Agent Fallon
characters.description: Ashley FallonBiographical informationDied1999;Golden Gate ParkPhysical descriptionSpeciesWendigoGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersShapeshifting(limited)Super StrengthSensingPower GrantingInactivepowersImmortalityAffiliationOccupationFBI AgentKilling lovers once every full moonLoyaltyEvilCharacter informationOnlyappearanceThe WendigoPortrayed byJocelyn Seagrave Agent Ashley Fallonworked with the FBI, though she was secretly aWendigo. She hunted victims with AB negativebloodwho were either in love or had good hearts. In1999, during a full moon,Piper Halliwellwas attacked by aWendigoafter getting a flat tire inGolden Gate Park. She was rescued by a man namedBilly Watersand taken to the hospital after being scratched. Agent Fallon arrived to interview Piper and revealed she was tracking the creature after it killed in Chicago and New Orleans. She had also run into Billy before, as he had been tracking the creature since it killed his fiancée in Lake Michigan.

characters.name: Agent Jackman
characters.description: Agent JackmanBiographical informationDied2002Physical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHair colorBrownEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationFBI agentWitch HunterCharacter informationOnlyappearanceWitch Way Now?Portrayed byBruce Campbell Agent Jackmanwas aWitch Hunterworking as an FBI agent. He descended from a long line of witch hunters dating back to theSalemWitch Trials. Using his cover as an FBI agent specializing in the occult, Jackman hunted and killed at least three witches.

characters.description: Agent KeyesPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHeight5′ 10½″ (1.79 m)Hair colorGingerEyes colorBlueSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationFederal AgentCharacter informationFirstappearanceSomething Wicca This Way Goes...?LastappearanceStill Charmed & KickingPortrayed byGlenn Morshower Agent Keyeswas a high-ranking agent of Homeland Security who was aware of the supernatural. He wanted to exposethe Charmed Onesas witches. Agent Keyes orderedKyle Brodyto putInspector Sheridanin a coma when she came too close to discovering the Halliwell's secret, as she was interfering with Homeland Security's own investigation.[1]

characters.name: The Aggressor
characters.description: The AggressorPhysical descriptionSpeciesArtificial BeingGenderMaleHair colorBlackEyes colorPurple(1st incarnation)Red(2nd incarnation)Skin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersHyper SpeedSuper StrengthPower AbsorptionRisingInactivepowersMolecular AdjustmentHigh ResistanceCharacter informationOnlyappearanceWitches in TightsPortrayed byTodd Tucker The Aggressorwas an artificial being created byKevin, a teenagedwitchwith the rare power ofThought Projection. Originally designed as asuperheroto protect him, the Aggressor later became a tool for the demonArnon. Kevin brought the Aggressor to life after being bullied byKaz. The Aggressor then attacked Kaz, though he accidentally killed him when the deflected the bullets as Kaz shot at him. Kevin then tore up the drawing, as he never wanted his creation to kill anyone.

characters.description: Sister AgnesBiographical informationBorn1953Physical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEyes colorBlueSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationNunLoyaltyGoodCharacter informationOnlyappearanceCharmed Again, Part 2Portrayed byWendy Phillips Sister Agneswas a nun who worked at thechurchinSan Francisco,California, wherePaige Matthewswas left in1977. characters.description: AidelPhysical descriptionSpeciesWitchGenderMaleHair colorBlackSkin colorOliveFamily informationParentsUnnamed parentsMagical characteristicsActivepowersSmoke SecretionBasicpowersSpell CastingPotion BrewingScryingMediumshipMagical itemsBook of ShadowsDesiresLearningwitchcraftAffiliationWhitelighterPaige MatthewsLoyaltyGoodCharacter informationFirstappearanceThe Perks of Being a WhitelighterLastappearanceThe Reason Aidelis a teenagedwitchwhomPaige Matthewsis teaching how to bring out and control his innerpower. His power isSmoke Secretion. While waiting forPaigeto continue their lessons, Aidel decided to cast a spell to reveal his true self from his family's spell book. However, as he had just read a book on Egyptian mythology, he had cats on his mind, which caused the spell to transform him into a bunch of black cats.

characters.name: Aku
characters.description: AkuBiographical informationDied2004;the UnderworldLevelUpper-LevelPhysical descriptionSpeciesCelerity DemonGenderMaleHeight5' 11" (1.80 m.)Eyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersFireballEnergy BallHyper SpeedSuper StrengthSmokingSummoningInactivepowersHigh ResistanceImmortalityMagical itemsBladed GlovesAffiliationResidenceThe UnderworldLoyaltyEvilCharacter informationFirstappearanceSomeone to Witch Over MeLastappearanceOrdinary WitchesPortrayed byPeter Woodward Akuwas aCelerity Demonand mentor toSarpedon, whom he taught of the upcoming threat ofAvatars. He fought his pupil to determine his strength and was subsequently vanquished by him. Aku withKazl and Zyke.

characters.name: Alan Sloan
characters.description: Alan SloanPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHair colorBlackEyes colorBrownSkin colorBrownAffiliationOccupationPublic DefenderCharacter informationOnlyappearanceThe Honeymoon's OverPortrayed byStoney Jackson Alan Sloanwas a public defender inSan Francisco, most notable for defendingEmilio Smithin many of his murder trials. During this time, he was actually possessed by aGuardianunder control of JudgeWilliam Hamilton. At some point before or during the trial againstEmilio Smith, Alan Sloan was possessed by aGuardianunder control of JudgeWilliam Hamilton, who was actually ademon. Sloan defended Emilio against district attorneyColeand won due to the lack of evidence, as the murder weapon had disappeared.

characters.name: Alan Stanton
characters.description: Alan StantonBiographical informationMaritalDating PruePhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHeight6′ 2″ (1.88 m)Hair colorBlackEyes colorGreenSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationBusinessman atBuckland Auction HouseCharacter informationOnlyappearanceShe's a Man, Baby, a Man!Portrayed byMichael McLafferty Alan Stantonwas amortalworking atBuckland Auction House. He briefly dated his co-workerPrue. After three dates with Alan,Pruementioned to her sisters that he was giving her mixed signals. The date was going well, though he dropped her off at home with barely even a goodbye kiss. When she ran into him the following day, she asked him about it, though Alan said the date went fine and that he would call her again. The conversation with her sisters the night before made her believe that last sentence to mean he would not do so.

characters.name: Alan Yates
characters.description: Alan YatesPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHeight6′ 1″ (1.85 m)Hair colorBrownSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationSlum lordCharacter informationOnlyappearanceLost and BoundPortrayed byAngelo Tiffe Alan Yateswas amortalslum lord who cut off heat to his tenants. He was being prosecuted by theSouth Bay Social Services. WhenColestarted working at the South Bay Social Services, his first case was against Alan Yates, who cut off heat to his tenants, causing an elderly tenant to get pneumonia, whom he then tried to evict. Since he was still getting used to being mortal, Cole struggled to contain his anger. However, he eventually assaulted the slum lord and was fired by his boss,Cynthia.

characters.name: Alastair
characters.description: "Are you sure that's it?" AlastairBiographical informationMaritalSinglePhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleHeight5'9" (1.75 m)Hair colorBrownEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteCharacter informationOnlyappearanceMalice in WonderlandPortrayed byMichael TrevinoAlastairwas aninnocentteenagedmortalwho became a victim ofPaul HaasandBlack Heart's scheme to lurethe Charmed Onesout of hiding. Alastair was one of the teenagers that were kidnapped for having a name similar to "Alice" from Alice in Wonderland. Alastair was seduced byBlack Heartand believed she was leading him to a party. She instead lured him to an alley and trapped him in the sewer, where he lost his mind after being trapped in anillusion with vivid images. According to locals, he was found sometime later, presumably with a lost mind.

characters.name: Alcatraz Guide
characters.description: Alcatraz GuideBiographical informationDied1999;Alcatraz IslandPhysical descriptionSpeciesMortalGenderMaleSkin colorWhiteAffiliationOccupationTour GuideCharacter informationOnlyappearanceThe Power of TwoPortrayed bySean Hennigan TheAlcatraz Guidewas amortalwho worked as a tour guide atAlcatraz Island. While giving a tour in1999, the guide waskilledby theSoul CollectorCharonto allow the spirit ofJackson Wardto possess the body and leave the island.Phoebewas there, and saw everything, and tried to prevent it, but could not. In the mean time, all othermortaltourists had no idea what was happening, and probably thoughtPhoebewas out of her mind.

characters.name: Alchemist
characters.description: AlchemistBiographical informationDied2005;mausoleumPhysical descriptionSpeciesAlchemistGenderMaleHair colorBlackEyes colorBrownSkin colorWhiteMagical characteristicsActivepowersFlamingNecromancyInactivepowersImmortalityMagical itemsAlchemist's ToolsAffiliationResidenceThe UnderworldLoyaltyZankouCharacter informationOnlyappearanceDeath Becomes ThemPortrayed byJohn Kassir TheAlchemistwas anAlchemisthired byZankouto control undead innocents to tormentThe Charmed Ones. The Alchemist worked withZankouduring the crusades, the September massacres and the black plague. Sometime after these events, Zankou was imprisoned, thus ending their partnership.
